prompt_text:
### Demographics: 72-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.2 kg; Height 159.3 cm; BMI 31.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 194mg/dL; 9 months ago 204mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 211mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.1kg; 9 months ago 78.7kg; 6 months ago 77.7kg; 3 months ago 77.8kg; current 79.2kg), Height (12 months ago 159.3cm; 9 months ago 159.3cm; 6 months ago 159.3cm; 3 months ago 159.3cm; current 159.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 117U/L; 9 months ago 115U/L; 6 months ago 121U/L; 3 months ago 121U/L; current 122U/L), AST (12 months ago 75U/L; 9 months ago 69U/L; 6 months ago 77U/L; 3 months ago 67U/L; current 75U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; current 9mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 325mg/g; 9 months ago 351mg/g; 6 months ago 566mg/g; 3 months ago 588mg/g; current 539mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 146mg/dL; 9 months ago 129mg/dL; 6 months ago 132mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.05 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
